case_title: ALAN HAVASSY VS. TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P., AND, TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION TO PLEAD FACTS REGARDING NOTICE OF BREACH OF HABITABILITY. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. (MOVING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) (302/EHG) JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; COURT REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR# 7489

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P., and, TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with leave to amend 2nd cause of action to plead facts regarding notice of breach of habitability. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the 3rd cause of action. (Moving party to prepare a form of order.) (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar May-07-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS TRINITY SAN FRANCISCO, L.P., TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES Motion to Strike Portions of Plaintiff's Complaint. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike punitive damages granted. Motion to strike attorneys fees granted. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Court Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR# 7489

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES
